name: Portainer
desc: Web UI for managing Docker containers, images, volumes and networks.
compose:
portainer:
    image: portainer/portainer-ce:latest
    container_name: portainer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "9000:9000"
      - "9443:9443"
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
      - portainer_data:/data

name: Watchtower
desc: Automatically updates running containers to the latest image version.
compose:
watchtower:
    image: containrrr/watchtower
    container_name: watchtower
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
    environment:
      - WATCHTOWER_CLEANUP=true
      - WATCHTOWER_SCHEDULE=0 0 4 * * *

name: Nginx Proxy Manager
desc: Reverse proxy with a web UI and one-click SSL via Let's Encrypt.
compose:
nginx-proxy-manager:
    image: jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:latest
    container_name: nginx-proxy-manager
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
      - "81:81"
    volumes:
      - npm_data:/data
      - npm_letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt

name: Pi-hole
desc: Network-wide ad and tracker blocker acting as a DNS sinkhole for your LAN.
compose:
pihole:
    image: pihole/pihole:latest
    container_name: pihole
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "53:53/tcp"
      - "53:53/udp"
      - "8080:80"
    environment:
      - TZ=Europe/London
      - WEBPASSWORD=${PIHOLE_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - pihole_etc:/etc/pihole
      - pihole_dnsmasq:/etc/dnsmasq.d
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN

name: Unbound
desc: Recursive DNS resolver — replaces external DNS (Google, Cloudflare). Typically used alongside Pi-hole as an upstream resolver on port 5335.
compose:
unbound:
    image: mvance/unbound:latest
    container_name: unbound
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5335:5335/tcp"
      - "5335:5335/udp"
    volumes:
      - unbound_conf:/opt/unbound/etc/unbound
    networks:
      dns_net:
        ipv4_address: 172.20.0.3

# Note: Pi-hole should have PIHOLE_DNS_=172.20.0.3#5335
# Add both services (Pi-hole + Unbound) to the dns_net network

name: WireGuard (wg-easy)
desc: VPN server with a simple web UI for managing clients and tunnels.
compose:
wg-easy:
    image: weejewel/wg-easy
    container_name: wg-easy
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "51820:51820/udp"
      - "51821:51821/tcp"
    volumes:
      - wg_data:/etc/wireguard
    environment:
      - WG_HOST=${WG_HOST}
      - PASSWORD=${WG_PASSWORD}
      - WG_DEFAULT_DNS=1.1.1.1
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN
      - SYS_MODULE
    sysctls:
      - net.ipv4.conf.all.src_valid_mark=1
      - net.ipv4.ip_forward=1

name: Tailscale
desc: WireGuard-based mesh VPN — secure remote access to your RPi and LAN without opening firewall ports. Simpler alternative to raw WireGuard.
compose:
tailscale:
    image: tailscale/tailscale:latest
    container_name: tailscale
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN
      - NET_RAW
    environment:
      - TS_AUTHKEY=${TAILSCALE_AUTHKEY}
      - TS_STATE_DIR=/var/lib/tailscale
      - TS_USERSPACE=false
      - TS_ACCEPT_DNS=false
    volumes:
      - tailscale_data:/var/lib/tailscale
      - /dev/net/tun:/dev/net/tun
    devices:
      - /dev/net/tun:/dev/net/tun

name: Cloudflared Tunnel
desc: Secure Cloudflare tunnel — expose services publicly without a static IP or open ports.
compose:
cloudflared:
    image: cloudflare/cloudflared:latest
    container_name: cloudflared
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: tunnel --no-autoupdate run --token ${CF_TUNNEL_TOKEN}

name: Vaultwarden
desc: Self-hosted password manager fully compatible with Bitwarden clients.
compose:
vaultwarden:
    image: vaultwarden/server:latest
    container_name: vaultwarden
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8080:80"
    volumes:
      - vaultwarden_data:/data
    environment:
      - ADMIN_TOKEN=${VW_ADMIN_TOKEN}
      - SIGNUPS_ALLOWED=false

name: Authelia
desc: Single sign-on (SSO) and two-factor authentication gateway for all services behind a reverse proxy.
compose:
authelia:
    image: authelia/authelia:latest
    container_name: authelia
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "9091:9091"
    volumes:
      - authelia_config:/config
    environment:
      - TZ=Europe/London

name: CrowdSec
desc: Collaborative IPS/IDS — analyses logs and blocks malicious IPs using a shared global threat database. Requires a bouncer (firewall or Nginx).
compose:
crowdsec:
    image: crowdsecurity/crowdsec:latest
    container_name: crowdsec
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      - COLLECTIONS=crowdsecurity/linux crowdsecurity/nginx crowdsecurity/ssh-bf
      - TZ=Europe/London
    volumes:
      - crowdsec_config:/etc/crowdsec
      - crowdsec_data:/var/lib/crowdsec/data
      - /var/log:/var/log:ro
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro

  # Firewall bouncer — blocks IPs at the iptables level
  # Run on the host (outside Docker):
  # sudo apt install crowdsec-firewall-bouncer-iptables
  # Or use an Nginx/Traefik bouncer container — see docs

name: Uptime Kuma
desc: Self-hosted uptime monitoring with Telegram, Slack and email notifications.
compose:
uptime-kuma:
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma:1
    container_name: uptime-kuma
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3001:3001"
    volumes:
      - uptime_kuma_data:/app/data

name: Grafana + Prometheus
desc: Metrics dashboards for CPU, RAM, network and custom application data.
compose:
grafana:
    image: grafana/grafana:latest
    container_name: grafana
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    volumes:
      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana
    environment:
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=${GRAFANA_PASSWORD}

  prometheus:
    image: prom/prometheus:latest
    container_name: prometheus
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "9090:9090"
    volumes:
      - prometheus_data:/prometheus
      - ./prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml

name: Netdata
desc: Real-time server monitoring — CPU, RAM, disk and network in a live dashboard.
compose:
netdata:
    image: netdata/netdata:latest
    container_name: netdata
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "19999:19999"
    cap_add:
      - SYS_PTRACE
    security_opt:
      - apparmor:unconfined
    volumes:
      - /etc/passwd:/host/etc/passwd:ro
      - /etc/group:/host/etc/group:ro
      - /proc:/host/proc:ro
      - /sys:/host/sys:ro

name: NetAlertX
desc: LAN network scanner — detects new and unknown devices and sends alerts. Runs in host network mode for full network visibility.
compose:
netalertx:
    image: ghcr.io/netalertx/netalertx:latest
    container_name: netalertx
    network_mode: host
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      - TZ=Europe/London
      - PORT=20211
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
    volumes:
      - netalertx_data:/data
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:uid=1000,gid=1000,mode=1700
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN
      - NET_RAW

name: Nextcloud
desc: Self-hosted Google Drive alternative with calendar, contacts and office apps.
compose:
nextcloud:
    image: nextcloud:latest
    container_name: nextcloud
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8082:80"
    volumes:
      - nextcloud_data:/var/www/html
    environment:
      - MYSQL_HOST=nextcloud-db
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=nextcloud
      - MYSQL_USER=nextcloud
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=${NEXTCLOUD_DB_PASSWORD}
    depends_on:
      - nextcloud-db

  nextcloud-db:
    image: mariadb:10.6
    container_name: nextcloud-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - nextcloud_db:/var/lib/mysql
    environment:
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=${NEXTCLOUD_DB_ROOT_PASSWORD}
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=nextcloud
      - MYSQL_USER=nextcloud
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=${NEXTCLOUD_DB_PASSWORD}

name: Filebrowser
desc: Lightweight browser-based file manager for your server's filesystem.
compose:
filebrowser:
    image: filebrowser/filebrowser:latest
    container_name: filebrowser
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8085:80"
    volumes:
      - /home:/srv
      - filebrowser_db:/database.db

name: Samba (NAS)
desc: Share folders across your local network using the SMB protocol (Windows-compatible).
compose:
samba:
    image: dperson/samba:latest
    container_name: samba
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "139:139"
      - "445:445"
    volumes:
      - /mnt/nas:/mnt/nas
    environment:
      - TZ=Europe/London
      - USERID=1000
      - GROUPID=1000
    command: >
      -u "pi;${SAMBA_PASSWORD}"
      -s "nas;/mnt/nas;yes;no;no;pi"

name: n8n
desc: Workflow automation with AI integrations, email, Telegram, webhooks and 400+ connectors.
compose:
n8n:
    image: n8nio/n8n:latest
    container_name: n8n
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5678:5678"
    volumes:
      - n8n_data:/home/node/.n8n
    environment:
      - N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE=true
      - N8N_BASIC_AUTH_USER=admin
      - N8N_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD=${N8N_PASSWORD}
      - TZ=Europe/London

name: Homebridge
desc: Bridge for devices not natively compatible with Apple HomeKit.
compose:
homebridge:
    image: homebridge/homebridge:latest
    container_name: homebridge
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    volumes:
      - homebridge_data:/homebridge
    environment:
      - TZ=Europe/London
      - PGID=1000
      - PUID=1000

name: Home Assistant
desc: Smart home hub with automations and 3000+ integrations for IoT devices.
compose:
homeassistant:
    image: homeassistant/home-assistant:stable
    container_name: homeassistant
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    volumes:
      - ha_config:/config
    environment:
      - TZ=Europe/London

name: Mosquitto MQTT
desc: Lightweight MQTT broker for IoT devices and Home Assistant integrations.
compose:
mosquitto:
    image: eclipse-mosquitto:latest
    container_name: mosquitto
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "1883:1883"
      - "9001:9001"
    volumes:
      - mosquitto_data:/mosquitto/data
      - mosquitto_log:/mosquitto/log
      - ./mosquitto.conf:/mosquitto/config/mosquitto.conf

name: Zigbee2MQTT
desc: Zigbee to MQTT bridge — requires a USB adapter (CC2531, Sonoff Zigbee 3.0).
compose:
zigbee2mqtt:
    image: koenkk/zigbee2mqtt:latest
    container_name: zigbee2mqtt
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8086:8080"
    volumes:
      - zigbee2mqtt_data:/app/data
    devices:
      - /dev/ttyUSB0:/dev/ttyUSB0
    environment:
      - TZ=Europe/London

name: Gitea
desc: Self-hosted Git service — lightweight GitHub alternative.
compose:
gitea:
    image: gitea/gitea:latest
    container_name: gitea
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3500:3000"
      - "222:22"
    volumes:
      - gitea_data:/data
    environment:
      - USER_UID=1000
      - USER_GID=1000
      - TZ=Europe/London

name: code-server
desc: VS Code in the browser — remote editor running directly on the RPi.
compose:
code-server:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/code-server:latest
    container_name: code-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8443:8443"
    volumes:
      - codeserver_config:/config
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Europe/London
      - PASSWORD=${CODESERVER_PASSWORD}
      - SUDO_PASSWORD=${CODESERVER_SUDO_PASSWORD}

name: Woodpecker CI
desc: Lightweight CI/CD pipeline — works great alongside Gitea.
compose:
woodpecker-server:
    image: woodpeckerci/woodpecker-server:latest
    container_name: woodpecker-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    volumes:
      - woodpecker_data:/var/lib/woodpecker
    environment:
      - WOODPECKER_OPEN=false
      - WOODPECKER_GITEA=true
      - WOODPECKER_GITEA_URL=http://gitea:3000
      - WOODPECKER_AGENT_SECRET=${WOODPECKER_SECRET}

  woodpecker-agent:
    image: woodpeckerci/woodpecker-agent:latest
    container_name: woodpecker-agent
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - woodpecker-server
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
    environment:
      - WOODPECKER_SERVER=woodpecker-server:9000
      - WOODPECKER_AGENT_SECRET=${WOODPECKER_SECRET}

name: Jellyfin
desc: Self-hosted media server for movies, TV shows and music — no cloud required.
compose:
jellyfin:
    image: jellyfin/jellyfin:latest
    container_name: jellyfin
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8096:8096"
    volumes:
      - jellyfin_config:/config
      - jellyfin_cache:/cache
      - /mnt/media:/media:ro
    environment:
      - TZ=Europe/London

name: Audiobookshelf
desc: Self-hosted audiobook and podcast server with a companion mobile app.
compose:
audiobookshelf:
    image: ghcr.io/advplyr/audiobookshelf:latest
    container_name: audiobookshelf
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "13378:80"
    volumes:
      - /mnt/audiobooks:/audiobooks
      - /mnt/podcasts:/podcasts
      - audiobookshelf_config:/config
      - audiobookshelf_metadata:/metadata

name: Paperless-ngx
desc: Document scanner and archive with OCR — digitise and search your paper documents.
compose:
paperless-ngx:
    image: ghcr.io/paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx:latest
    container_name: paperless-ngx
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8010:8000"
    volumes:
      - paperless_data:/usr/src/paperless/data
      - paperless_media:/usr/src/paperless/media
      - paperless_export:/usr/src/paperless/export
      - paperless_consume:/usr/src/paperless/consume
    environment:
      - PAPERLESS_REDIS=redis://paperless-redis:6379
      - PAPERLESS_DBHOST=paperless-db
      - PAPERLESS_DBPASS=${PAPERLESS_DB_PASSWORD}
      - PAPERLESS_ADMIN_USER=admin
      - PAPERLESS_ADMIN_PASSWORD=${PAPERLESS_ADMIN_PASSWORD}
    depends_on:
      - paperless-db
      - paperless-redis

  paperless-db:
    image: postgres:15
    container_name: paperless-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - paperless_pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=paperless
      - POSTGRES_USER=paperless
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${PAPERLESS_DB_PASSWORD}

  paperless-redis:
    image: redis:7
    container_name: paperless-redis
    restart: unless-stopped

name: Linkwarden
desc: Self-hosted bookmark manager with full page archiving and tagging.
compose:
linkwarden:
    image: ghcr.io/linkwarden/linkwarden:latest
    container_name: linkwarden
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3002:3000"
    volumes:
      - linkwarden_data:/data/data
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://linkwarden:${LINKWARDEN_DB_PASSWORD}@linkwarden-db:5432/linkwarden
      - NEXTAUTH_SECRET=${LINKWARDEN_SECRET}
      - NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3002
    depends_on:
      - linkwarden-db

  linkwarden-db:
    image: postgres:15
    container_name: linkwarden-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - linkwarden_pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=linkwarden
      - POSTGRES_USER=linkwarden
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${LINKWARDEN_DB_PASSWORD}

name: Dashy
desc: Customisable homepage dashboard with icons and links to all your services.
compose:
dashy:
    image: lissy93/dashy:latest
    container_name: dashy
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8087:80"
    volumes:
      - ./dashy-config.yml:/app/public/conf.yml

name: Homarr
desc: Modern dashboard with widgets and automatic Docker service discovery.
compose:
homarr:
    image: ghcr.io/ajnart/homarr:latest
    container_name: homarr
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "7575:7575"
    volumes:
      - homarr_configs:/app/data/configs
      - homarr_icons:/app/public/icons
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
